title: Realizer fix-tasks should auto-dispatch on interrogation — remove manual Send step
summary: interrogate() calls dispatch_lug_direct(lug, hub_path) which writes lug to spoke's WAI-Spoke/seed/ingest/incoming/ inbox directly. Manual Send step removed as it adds friction without safety.
why_it_matters: Auto-dispatch is appropriate when the receiving agent must decide what to do with the lug anyway. Manual approval only adds friction, not safety.
